category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU diction and style; official GNU page says diction identifies wordy/misused phrases and style analyzes document readability characteristics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description names GNU diction; official GNU page title is Style and Diction.
docs_sources: Official GNU package page is the best public documentation surface found and links to official GNU FTP releases.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU package page points to GNU FTP tarballs, and no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official GNU page describes diction/style text-analysis behavior; source_facts.executables lists diction and style command-line tools.
